ul.li: Fixed input size: Must provide complete frames
Use case: Offline batch processing, file analysis
Ring buffer accumulation: Flexible chunk sizes
Frame extraction: Overlapping frame extraction on demand
Use case: Real-time streaming, continuous monitoring

div.p: Both modes use the same 3-stream asynchronous pipeline for parallel H2D/Compute/D2H.
Performance: Mean latency 86.79 µs Direct pipeline = minimal overhead Ideal for high-throughput batch processing
